data.content: Plan review approved. Root cause confirmed: both knots-backend.ts and beads-backend.ts share isPhaseFilter for queued and in_action, causing includeDescendantsOfQueueParents to run for Active view. Plan to restrict descendant expansion to queued-only filter is correct, complete, and low-risk. Test strategy properly replaces the existing bug-codifying test and adds beads parity coverage.
